name: errorcodes
head: 9f3e7979499529ad5d1023e2559c6c98a119ccc8
author: Araq
description: Errorcodes maps Nim error states and POSIX and HTTP error codes to a single common enum. It can be used as an alternative to exceptions.

releases.d: Errorcodes maps Nim error states and POSIX and HTTP error codes to a single common enum. It can be used as an alternative to exceptions.
